npc-queen.secret-text.case1.1: Hello PLAYER, what are you doing here?
npc-queen.secret-text.case1.8: You are not just going to leave me here, are you?
npc-queen.secret-text.case1.10: I guess i could give you a hint
npc-queen.secret-text.case1.11: On some hidden achievement in this "Game"
npc-queen.secret-text.case1.13: And if you wait enough, you might meet something
npc-queen.secret-text.case1.14: Or someone that could give you some hidden "Achievement" you might be searching for
npc-queen.secret-text.case1.15: And if you are still listening
npc-queen.secret-text.case1.16: I wish that you have fun...
npc-queen.secret-text.case1.17: AND don't forget to smash that button and ring that bell for more things like this
npc-queen.secret-text.case1.18: So just, go have some fun
npc-queen.secret-text.case1.19: This is all i had to say to you
npc-queen.secret-text.case1.21: So just, go fall, or do anything else
npc-queen.secret-text.case1.22: And im going to sit here
npc-queen.secret-text.case2.12: oh wait, you already are doing it
npc-queen.secret-text.case2.13: all you need to do is just keep falling
npc-queen.secret-text.case2.14: and falling, till these bobs chill down
npc-queen.secret-text.case2.15: and give you an achievement for surviving
npc-queen.secret-text.case2.16: also these bobs are not the normal bobs, they are just corrupted...
npc-queen.secret-text.case3.12: but it seems that you already got it
npc-queen.secret-text.case3.14: i don't really have anything else to say
npc-queen.secret-text.case3.15: so go have fun, get the other achievements you didn't get
